title: Deuterium
description: A Minecraft modpack that provides optimization and assistance.
body:
![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Ginsway/Deuterium)
![GitHub all releases](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/Ginsway/Deuterium/total?label=GitHub%20Downloads)
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/nHps3us9?label=Modrinth%20Downloads)
![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Ginsway/Deuterium)
![GitHub release (latest by date including pre-releases)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Ginsway/Deuterium?include_prereleases)  
Deuterium is a basic modpack that uses Rubidium/Embeddium/Sodium as the main optimization mod, aiming to improve the vanilla survival experience without changing the game's mechanism. It has good scalability, and you can add your favorite mod to this modpack.

### Performance
Due to the low compatibility of OptiFine, Deuterium  uses [Rubidium](/mod/rubidium)/[Embeddium](/mod/embeddium) as the main performance mod and improves the fps while ensuring compatibility as much as possible

### OptiFine parity
Supports most Optfine features.

### FAQ
Q: What should I do if my game is in Chinese?
A: This is caused by the [I18nUpdateMod](/mod/i18nupdatemod), which automatically switches the game's language to Chinese upon launch. You can uninstall this mod to resolve this problem,  Additionally, you may delete the resourcepack named *Minecraft-Mod-Language-Modpack-Converted.zip* if it is present.

If you find any bugs or incompatible, please submit them to <https://github.com/Ginsway/Deuterium/issues>, to help me improve the modpack.
